title: paraspalathus sericea
intro: Paraspalathus sericea, also known as the Silky Spurge or Velvet Spurge, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its latex, which contains a compound called ingenol mebutate, a potent anti-inflammatory and cytotoxic agent. The health benefits of Paraspalathus sericea include its potential to treat various skin conditions, such as psoriasis and warts, as well as its antiviral and antibacterial properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including creams and ointments, to treat skin irritations and infections.
